task_payload.business_value: Prevents provider work from starting on top of incomplete continuity or missing traceability.
task_payload.goal: Close Sprint 25 only if the `1.4` billing lane is structurally executable and fully linked into the canonical planning docs.
acceptance_criteria: Sprint 25 fails if v6 continuity, requirement rows, or testing rows are missing.
The acceptance packet includes a clear baseline of public brand and billing gaps for later implementation stories.
Release closeout artifacts exist even though runtime code is not yet changed.
constraints: Do not mark `1.4` runtime implementation complete from planning artifacts alone.
explicitly_not_doing: Provider, route, or UI code changes.
not_do: Provider, route, or UI code changes.
out_of_scope: Provider, route, or UI code changes.

primary_files: docs/requirements/saas-starter 一天落地实施说明.md

normal: Run the Sprint 25 traceability audit and confirm v6 is treated as an authoritative backlog root.
exception: Fail if any Sprint 25 required document or execution-order file is missing.

story_inputs: Dependency outputs available from: FE-114, FE-115
story_process: Inspect the declared scope and understand the current implementation before editing.
Implement only the change required for this story goal and keep the blast radius within the card.
Run story-specific validation and record reusable evidence for acceptance.
story_outputs: Updated story artifacts in: docs/requirements/*, docs/testing/*, tasks/backlog_v6_freemius_primary_billing_1_4/*
Validation evidence and delivery artifacts archived for this story.
verification_basis: Sprint 25 fails if v6 continuity, requirement rows, or testing rows are missing.
The acceptance packet includes a clear baseline of public brand and billing gaps for later implementation stories.
Release closeout artifacts exist even though runtime code is not yet changed.

intentional_deviations: Telemetry and upgrade endpoints remain disabled by default in local agentsystem runs.
Claude-host-specific preambles are mirrored into local standards and adapters rather than executed verbatim.
